nodes.name: 📥 Watch Receipts Folder
nodes.notes: TRIGGER NODE: Monitors the 'Receipts-Inbox' Google Drive folder for new files.

nodes.name: 📄 Download Receipt
nodes.notes: DOWNLOAD NODE: Fetches the receipt file from Google Drive.

nodes.name: 📑 Extract from PDF
nodes.notes: EXTRACT NODE: Extracts text content from PDF files.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert accountant. Analyze this receipt text and extract expense data.

Receipt Text:
{{ $json.text }}

Return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown, no explanation) with these exact fields:
{
  "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "vendor": "Store name",
  "category": "One of: Office Supplies, Travel, Meals & Entertainment, Tech & Equipment, Vehicle & Fuel, Utilities, Software & Subscriptions, Professional Services, Other",
  "description": "Brief summary of items",
  "subtotal": 0.00,
  "tax": 0.00,
  "tip": 0.00,
  "total": 0.00,
  "payment_method": "Card type ***last4",
  "transaction_id": "Receipt number",
  "confidence": "high/medium/low"
}

Rules:
- Return ONLY JSON, no other text
- Use empty string for fields you cannot find
- Numbers without currency symbols
- Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

nodes.name: 🤖 Parse with Gemini
nodes.notes: LLM CHAIN NODE: Uses Gemini to analyze the extracted text and return structured JSON.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse Response
nodes.notes: CODE NODE: Parses the JSON response, handles null values, and formats for Google Sheets.

nodes.name: 📊 Add to Expense Tracker
nodes.notes: GOOGLE SHEETS NODE: Appends parsed receipt data to spreadsheet using auto-mapping.

nodes.name: 📁 Move to Processed
nodes.notes: MOVE FILE NODE: Archives receipt to Processed folder.
